Power Pages release updates and new features

Release plans:
- 2023 release wave 2 plan
- 2023 release wave 1 plan
- 2022 release wave 2 plan

Privacy notice: Dynamics 365 data can be exposed through external-facing website.

Azure components involved:
- Azure Web Apps (hosting)
- Azure Traffic Manager (high availability)
- Azure Service Bus (cache invalidation)
- Azure Key Vault (configuration)
- Azure Storage (data storage)
- Microsoft Entra ID (authentication)

Updated: 2026-03-24
